attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 DST (Dermatology & Soft Tissue) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Bidirectional tier calibration reviewed and accepted: benign / self-limiting dermatoses held low-tier (T1/T2, self-care + routine referral), while skin malignancy (melanoma/SCC/BCC), spreading soft-tissue infection, limb-threat (critical limb ischaemia, diabetic foot ulcer) and airway/anaphylaxis risk were escalated to true acuity (T3/T4) with mandatory escalation edges; no autonomous diagnosis, no paediatric dosing.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all DST casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Age inferred as ~38 and sex inferred as female from the source note (independent adult, partner present, 75 kg, period-pain context for the NSAID) — please confirm on clinician review; no paediatric dosing involved.
Geography inferred as RA1_major_city (private residence, out-of-hours home visit) — please confirm.
Provisional case_id SPEC-DERM-01-00291 — ingest --reseq will assign the real sequence.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source note's clinician airway/oropharyngeal examination, measured vitals, blanch (diascopy) test, and clinician-administered stat oral cetirizine were reprojected to the AI-appropriate actions — describe the video-observable rash, recognise the pattern, advise a patient-self-administered OTC non-sedating antihistamine, advise NSAID cessation, and give anaphylaxis safety-netting. Clinician-measured vitals and airway exam are sealed in nodes 10/11 with telehealth_limits_for_this_case.

Calibration intent: over-triage-resistance case. Baseline tier T2 with minimum_viable_tier_for_pass T1; the negative anaphylaxis screen licenses low-tier self-care + safety-netting, and over-triage to ED/000 is the scored defect.

SNOMED CT-AU, ICD-10-AM and AMT codes are CANDIDATES only (unverified_pending_terminology_receipt); the AMT cetirizine code is an unverified candidate and must be confirmed against a terminology receipt.
Cetirizine dose taken from the source note (stat 20 mg; up to 20 mg BD for up to 14 days) and expressed against ASCIA up-dosing guidance; no dose was synthesised beyond the note.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
